records.question: Which stadium named Baku Olympic Stadium in Baku, Azerbaijan, that opened in 2005 or later and has a capacity of at most 68000, hosted the World Junior event in 2013?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN event ON stadium.id = event.stadium_id
WHERE event.name = 'World Junior' AND stadium.capacity <= 68000 AND stadium.city = 'Baku' AND stadium.country = 'Azerbaijan' AND stadium.opening_year >= 2005 AND stadium.name = 'Baku Olympic Stadium' AND event.year = '2013'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.ID FROM stadium AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.Stadium_ID WHERE T1.name = 'Baku Olympic Stadium' AND T1.City = 'Baku' AND T1.Country = 'Azerbaijan' AND T1.Opening_year >= 2005 AND T1.Capacity <= 68000 AND T2.Name = 'World Junior' AND T2.Year = '2013'

records.question: Did the Nou Mestalla stadium in Valencia, Spain, with a capacity of at least 75000 that opened in 2004 or later, host the FINA event in 2016?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN event ON stadium.id = event.stadium_id
WHERE event.year = '2016' AND stadium.city = 'Valencia' AND event.name = 'FINA' AND stadium.country = 'Spain' AND stadium.opening_year >= 2004 AND stadium.name = 'Nou Mestalla' AND stadium.capacity >= 75000
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.ID FROM stadium AS T1 INNER JOIN event AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.Stadium_ID WHERE T1.name = 'Nou Mestalla' AND T1.City = 'Valencia' AND T1.Country = 'Spain' AND T1.Capacity >= 75000 AND T1.Opening_year >= 2004 AND T2.Name = 'FINA' AND T2.Year = '2016'
